summary: Completed comprehensive testing of movies/series/anime pages with new multi-row grid layout and advanced filters. All requested features working correctly including platform filters, sort options, year filters, and pagination.
passed_tests: Backend: All TMDB discover endpoints support new filter parameters (provider, year, sort_by)
Backend: Movie discovery with Netflix provider filter works
Backend: TV discovery with combined filters works
Backend: All 42 API tests passed including new filter functionality
Frontend: Movies page shows multi-row grid layout (grid-cols-2 sm:3 md:4 lg:5 xl:6)
Frontend: TV Shows page shows multi-row grid layout
Frontend: Anime page shows multi-row grid layout
Frontend: All pages have 'Filtres' button that toggles advanced filter panel
Frontend: Platform buttons show with logos (Netflix, Disney+, Amazon Prime, etc.)
Frontend: Sort dropdown ('Trier par') works with popularity, rating, date, revenue options
Frontend: Year dropdown ('Annee') works correctly
Frontend: Netflix filter updates page title correctly (e.g., 'Films sur Netflix')
Frontend: Crunchyroll filter works on Anime page
Frontend: 'Effacer' button resets all filters correctly
Frontend: Pagination works with 'Precedent/Suivant' buttons
Frontend: URL parameters update correctly when filters change
Frontend: Combined filters work (provider + year + sort)
Integration: Filter changes trigger API calls and update content
Integration: Page titles reflect active filters
Integration: Clear filters resets both UI and API calls

success_percentage.integration: 100% (filters, API calls, and content updates working)
